product.body_html:
B12 deficiency doesn't just make you tired — it destroys your nerve insulation, and the damage can be permanent if you ignore it long enough.

Your nervous system runs on B vitamins. B12 maintains the myelin sheath — the protective coating around every nerve fibre in your body. Without adequate B12, that sheath degrades. You feel it as tingling, numbness, burning in the hands and feet, brain fog, and eventually permanent neurological damage. B12 deficiency is epidemic, and it's silent: the deficiency builds for years before symptoms appear. It's particularly devastating in vegans and vegetarians (no dietary source), in people over 50 (stomach acid needed to absorb B12 declines with age), and in diabetics on metformin (the drug actively blocks B12 absorption).

But B12 isn't the only critical player. B1 (thiamine) is essential for nerve signal conduction. B6 supports both serotonin synthesis and the formation of nerve insulation. B9 as methylfolate (not synthetic folic acid) is required for DNA repair and methylation — the chemical process that regulates gene expression, mood, and detoxification. Romira Vitamin B Complex delivers all 8 essential B vitamins in their active forms — the forms your body can use immediately, without the metabolic conversion steps that a significant portion of the population cannot perform efficiently due to MTHFR gene variants.

Key Benefits

  • ✓ Protects and supports myelin sheath — the nerve insulation that degrades without B12
  • ✓ Reduces nerve burning, tingling, and neuropathy symptoms
  • ✓ Active B12 (methylcobalamin) — immediately usable, superior to cyanocobalamin
  • ✓ Methylfolate (B9) — active form, suitable for MTHFR gene variants
  • ✓ B6 supports serotonin synthesis and healthy mood
  • ✓ Combats fatigue and supports sustainable energy production
  • ✓ All 8 B vitamins in active forms — no conversion required

Formulation

All 8 essential B vitamins (B1, B2, B3, B5, B6, B7, B9, B12) in their biologically active forms: methylcobalamin (B12), methylfolate (B9), pyridoxal-5-phosphate (B6), and riboflavin-5-phosphate (B2). Not cheap synthetic forms that require liver conversion.

Who It's For

Vegans, vegetarians, people over 50, diabetics on metformin, anyone with nerve symptoms (tingling, numbness, burning), fatigue, mood issues, or anyone wanting active-form B vitamin insurance.

Don't wait for permanent nerve damage — protect your nervous system with complete, active-form B vitamins from Romira today.
